general.contactSupport: If the problem persists, please contact support

network.offline: You are offline. Please check your internet connection.
network.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

server.error: Server error. Please try again later.
server.maintenance: Server is under maintenance. Please try again later.
server.overloaded: Server is overloaded. Please try again later.

authentication.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
authentication.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.
authentication.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
authentication.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action

permission.insufficientPermissions: You don't have permission to perform this action
permission.ownerOnly: Only the owner can perform this action
permission.adminOnly: Only administrators can perform this action
permission.memberOnly: Only group members can perform this action

rateLimit.exceeded: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
rateLimit.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please slow down.

404.title: 404 - Page Not Found
404.heading: Oops! Page not found
404.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

500.title: 500 - Server Error
500.heading: Something went wrong
500.message: We're experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later.

403.title: 403 - Access Forbidden
403.heading: Access Denied
403.message: You don't have permission to access this page.

503.title: 503 - Service Unavailable
503.heading: Service Temporarily Unavailable
503.message: We're performing maintenance. Please check back soon.

specific.taskNotFound: Task not found or has been deleted
specific.noteNotFound: Note not found or has been deleted
specific.groupNotFound: Group not found or has been deleted
specific.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this group
specific.notMember: You are not a member of this group
specific.resourceNotFound: Resource not found or has been deleted
specific.commentNotFound: Comment not found or has been deleted
